'''Tazur Pheron''' was a fiercely loyal [[House Mecetti|Mecetti]] Knight. He was the grand-nephew of Lord [[Bodé Leobund XI|Leobund]], the [[High Lord]] of Mecetti during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]]. He was a danger seeker who spent most of his time engaging in extreme sports or dueling.

==Appearances==
